case_title: TANDENICO JONES VS. VERONICA TRAN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, TANDENICO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRAN, VERONICA DBA TRUNG LAM REAL ESTATE LAM, TRUNG DBA TRUNG LAM REAL ESTATE $1,034.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,034.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS A REFUND OF MONEY PAID IN EXCESS OF PLAINTIFF'S RENT PAYMENT PURSUANT TO THE SECTION 8 LEASE.
